title: Lychnophorella bishopii

The genus Lychnophorella is a monotypic genus, meaning that it contains only one species. This genus is part of the subfamily Iridoideae, which is a subfamily within the family Iridaceae. The classification of Lychnophorella bishopii is further detailed by its order (Asparagales) and division (Angiospermae), placing it within the flowering plant group. Its classification is a key aspect of understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this specific plant species.
